faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Riverdale?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Riverdale typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms or floors require treatment. We provide free estimates and customized treatment plans for every property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat my Riverdale home for fleas?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout Riverdale. Most treatments take 1-2 hours, and you can typically return home within 4-6 hours. Follow-up visits are scheduled 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away during application and for 4-6 hours afterward. All our technicians are licensed and follow strict safety protocols.

faqs.question: Do you treat both houses and apartments in Riverdale?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide flea treatment for all types of Riverdale properties, including single-family homes, co-ops, condos, and rental apartments. Our methods are adapted to work effectively in both large homes near Fieldston and smaller apartments throughout the neighborhood.
